evidence: Glob of target-repo/commands/trading-ideas/ returns no CLAUDE.md file; plugin root confirmed absent
description: No CLAUDE.md in plugin root (commands/trading-ideas/); R49 requires it for Claude Code integration context
suggested_fix: Create commands/trading-ideas/CLAUDE.md describing the plugin purpose, /trading-ideas:research invocation, and customization options

description: README Usage shows /trading-ideas AAPL (direct-file install name) but plugin.json description explicitly says 'via /trading-ideas:research command' — two install paths yield different command names with no explanation
suggested_fix: Add a note in the README Usage section explaining that plugin install (/trading-ideas:research) and direct-file install (/trading-ideas) produce different command names

evidence: Command body opens with 'When given a stock ticker' with no prior branch for empty $ARGUMENTS
description: No empty input handling: bare invocation with no ticker leaves behavior undefined
suggested_fix: Add opening guard: if no arguments provided, ask the user for a ticker symbol before proceeding with the analysis framework

evidence: argument-hint declares [--detailed] but no conditional branch for this flag exists anywhere in the command body
description: --detailed flag declared in argument-hint has no corresponding conditional behavior; README implies enhanced output for the flag
suggested_fix: Either add a conditional section for --detailed (e.g. additional deep-dive sections) or remove the flag from argument-hint and README examples

description: plugin.json declares no commands array; auto-discovery from the commands/ directory may work but explicit declaration is safer
suggested_fix: Add "commands": ["commands/research.md"] to plugin.json to explicitly register the available command
